name: parvazlog
description: Desktop ticket manager for Mr. Vala

scripts.build: tsc && cp src/index.html src/style.css dist/ && cp -r node_modules/@majidh1/jalalidatepicker/dist dist/lib && cp -r node_modules/select2/dist dist/select2 && cp node_modules/jquery/dist/jquery.min.js dist/jquery.min.js && cp -r assets dist/assets && npx esbuild src/renderer.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/renderer.js --target=es2020 --platform=browser
